column8: Jake Bailey of the Patriots' punt is blocked at the 32-yard line (-68) by Matthew Adams of the Colts. Recovered by E.J Speed for a touchdown (-50).
Jordan Berry of the Vikings' punt is BLOCKED by Frankie Luvu of the Panthers. RECOVERED by Kenny Robinson and returned 4 yards for a TOUCHDOWN.
Logan Cooke of the Jaguars' punt is blocked by Zaire Franklin of the Colts, touchdown
Matt Haack of the Bills' punt is BLOCKED at the 23-yard line (-77) by Miles Killebrew of the Steelers. RECOVERED by Ulysees Gilbert and returned for 9 yards for a TOUCHDOWN (50).
Dustin Colquitt of the Falcons' punt is blocked at the 17-yard line by Dorance Armstrong of the Cowboys. Returned by Nahshon Wright for a touchdown (-50)
